_comment: Fill this in during Phase 0 bench verification using test_left_joints.py. Copy to calibration.json (not this file) once filled in. Do not guess these values -- run the physical checks described in mirror_bridge.py's module docstring.

sign._comment: 1 if a positive delta in Isaac Sim moves this joint the same physical direction as a positive delta sent to the real motor; -1 if opposite. Determine per-joint with test_left_joints.py --joint LJn.pos --step 3.0

offset_rad._comment: Optional small residual trim in radians, added after the sign flip. Leave at 0.0 if zero-calibration (openarm-can-set-zero) was done properly -- this is not a substitute for real zeroing.

gripper._comment: Raw LJ8.pos motor value at fully-open and fully-closed, from ramping LJ8.pos with test_left_joints.py.
